name: codara-skills
description: Bundled skills for Codara including hooks toolkit, permissions management, MCP integration, and workflow automation

skills.name: hooks
skills.description: Complete lifecycle hooks toolkit - ready-made templates (security-check, audit-logger, sandbox), custom configuration, and skill scaffolding

skills.name: permissions
skills.description: Permissions configuration toolkit - view current state, understand modes, configure allow/deny/ask rules with templates

skills.name: skill-dev
skills.description: Comprehensive skill development guide - structure, frontmatter, validation, and best practices for building Codara skills

skills.name: builtin-agents
skills.description: Built-in agent types for sub-agent delegation - Explore (fast search), Plan (architecture), general-purpose (full capabilities)

skills.name: mcp
skills.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration guide - connect external services and tools to Codara

skills.name: commit
skills.description: Intelligent git commit creation with automatic change analysis and meaningful commit messages

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Multi-agent PR code review with parallel analysis for bugs, security, and CLAUDE.md compliance (requires gh CLI)
